SectionIntro: Programs designed to be modular and responsive to your group's current state.

Cards.Title: Guided Forest Bathing
Cards.Body: A sequence of 'invitations' designed to slow the heart rate and open the senses to the forest's biological communication.

Cards.Title: Somatic Journaling
Cards.Body: Externalizing internal landscapes. We use the wild as a mirror for personal and professional narrative shifts.

Cards.Title: Bespoke Retreats
Cards.Body: Fully tailored multi-day journeys combining wilderness solo time, somatic workshops, and team alignment.

Cards.Title: Virtual Forest Bathing
Cards.Body: Indoor guided experiences that bring restorative nature-based attention practices into weather-safe spaces.
